# kconfig


```text
usage: kconfig [-h] [config_name]

```

Outputs the kernel config (requires CONFIG_IKCONFIG).
### Positional arguments

|Positional Argument|Help|
| :--- | :--- |
|config_name|A config name to search for|

### Optional arguments

|Short|Long|Help|
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
|-h|--help|show this help message and exit|
